class.name: navflex_cmdbehavior/CmdBehavior
class.description: A recovery behavior that drives the robot based on a runtime command string. Command format: "linear:<distance_m>" or "rotate:<angle_deg>". Positive distance = forward, negative = backward. Positive angle = CCW (left), negative = CW (right). Speed configured via parameters: linear_vel [m/s], angular_vel [rad/s].
